description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Semgrep that scans code for security issues on push to dev and release-* branches, on pull requests to dev, and on a weekly schedule. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read permissions to repository contents and write permissions to security events. The job should check out the code, run a Semgrep scan using the project's configuration on Semgrep.dev, generate a SARIF file, and upload it.
